question:
Will Real Oviedo vs. Rayo Vallecano end in a draw?

Description: In the upcoming game, scheduled for November 23, 2025
If the game ends in a draw, this market will resolve to "Yes".
Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".
If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed.
If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve to "Yes".
This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

Resolution source: https://www.laliga.com/

evidences.title: Rayo Vallecano boycott training session over bizarre theft - Yahoo Sports
evidences.content: Soccer image Soccer image ... Fantasy image Fantasy image Watch image Watch image Network image Network image Football Espana # Rayo Vallecano boycott training session over bizarre theft Rayo Vallecano boycott training session over bizarre theft Rayo Vallecano head into the final weeks of the 2024/25 La Liga season with plenty still to play for in the run-in. Victory over rivals Getafe last time out lifted Inigo Perez’s team back up to eight place in the table which will be enough for European qualification. Due to Barcelona’s success in the Copa del Rey final, and La Liga being granted an extra UEFA Champions League place for next season, the team in eighth will reach the Conference League in 2025/26. [...] Rayo will likely need to ensure they keep on winning games this month, to keep themselves in the hunt – starting with a trip to Las Palmas on May 9. Perez’s charge for a European spot for the first time in two decades at Rayo remains in his own hands, but they will also face the teams currently in sixth, seventh and tenth place in their final three league outings of the campaign.
